title: Lian Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Lian with a Z-Score of +3.14. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Lian has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The high temperature is causing a significant increase in cooling degree days (CDD) with a value of 10.0 GG, while the heating degree days (HDD) remain at 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 83% and the wind speed is 4.7 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
